title: 这只价值 800 美元的跳跃机器人摄像狗让我充满了欢乐
summary: What if you had a drone that wasn't a buzzy, annoying fly people wanted to swat - but rather a cute dog that runs and jumps? What if it could do tricks on command and film your tricks as well? What if it could get right back up after a nasty-looking crash, dozens of times […]（原题：This jumping $800 robot camera dog filled me with joy）

title: NVIDIA 和 Hugging Face 为乐机器人带来新模型和框架
summary: Hugging Face LeRobot is an open-source robotics library for training, running, and sharing robot datasets, models, policies, and workflows. The post NVIDIA and Hugging Face bring new models and frameworks to LeRobot appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：NVIDIA and Hugging Face bring new models and frameworks to LeRobot）

title: ENCY Software 与史陶比尔机器人公司合作简化机器人编程
summary: ENCY Software and Stäubli Robotics have signed a global agreement to make robot programming more intuitive, faster, and more accessible.
